title: NO DOUBT
description:
About the Game

"What if an ordinary office worker suddenly became a cleaning specialist for ghosts?!" 

Put your speed, skills, and tools to the test to tidy up and impress the ghostly residents. But beware—as dusk turns to night, the spirits will come out to haunt and disrupt your work. Manage your time and tools wisely; if you can satisfy their needs and handle them just right, you might just unlock unexpected, intimate, and special moments with these ghostly girls! Just don't fail, or your terrifying boss will fire you on the spot!

Gameplay

Manage your time, organize your tools, and handle the spirits! 

Your job is to clean up various messes within the time limit by matching the right tool to the right type of stain. However, your carrying capacity is limited to only 2 items at a time, making strategic planning and routing essential. The game transitions from the calm Dusk Phase into the chaotic Night Phase, where the ghosts become highly aggressive and actively hinder your progress. Along the way, choosing the right dialogue to charm the ghosts will reward you with heartwarming and special moments together.

Story

From an accountant to a paranormal cleaner: A conflict of sight and fear. 

One day, Earia is abruptly summoned by the CEO and transferred from the accounting department to a "special case" cleaning crew. In the midst of her confusion, the CEO reveals she knows Earia's deepest secret: her ability to see ghosts. Handed a set of cleaning supplies and thrust out the door, Earia is forced into a cruel irony. Even though she possesses the rare gift of seeing spirits, she is absolutely terrified of them! And so, her struggle to survive the workplace while facing her worst nightmares begins.

Characters

• Earia (The Protagonist): An anxious young woman who is terrified of ghosts, now forced to face her worst nightmares just to keep her job.

• Ms. Drown: A seductive and playful spirit who loves pranking people and spending an eternity taking baths.

• Sui: A tsundere ghost who hides her true feelings behind occult rituals, satanic worship, and a hardcore gaming hobby.

• Smoky (The CEO): A tough, calm, and mysterious boss. She is a heavy smoker with a hidden past, and trust us—you never want to see her angry.

Key Features

• Cleaning QTE Mini-Games: Every cleaning tool features unique Quick Time Events (QTE). Master the rhythm to wipe out stains efficiently!

• Grave Obsessions, Unique Obstacles: Each ghost sabotages you based on their cause of death. Expect water hazards and floods when dealing with a drowned spirit!

• Spooky Sabotage: Ghosts will mischievously find all kinds of ways to prank you, adding chaos and making your cleaning job much harder!

• Affection System & Fan Service: Clean flawlessly and pick the perfect answers to satisfy the ghosts, unlocking special fan service scenes and memorable moments.
description_short: Play as an unlucky cleaner in this time-management horror comedy! Use the right tools to clear stains within the time limit while surviving playful hauntings from ghostly girls during the night. Charm them with the right choices to unlock special fanservice moments!
